task_completion.visual_evidence: The AttendHRM main window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Salary Revision or Bulk Salary Revision module
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window or tab related to Salary Revision, Bulk Salary Revision, or Employee Salary is open.

task_completion.description: Filter or select the 'Junior Developer' designation
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Junior Developer' is visible in a designation filter, search box, or selection list.

task_completion.description: Enter the Basic Salary as 3500.00 and Effective Date as 01-Apr-2025
task_completion.visual_evidence: '3500' or '3500.00' is entered in a Basic Salary field, and '01-Apr-2025' (or '2025-04-01') is entered in an Effective Date field.

task_completion.description: Save or apply the bulk salary revision
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Save', 'Apply', or 'Update' button in the salary revision window, or an attempt to save is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the AttendHRM graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with AttendHRM windows and menus, not command prompt or PowerShell terminals modifying the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine AttendHRM software
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window has AttendHRM branding and standard UI elements, not a generic text editor or script.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify salaries for other employees
integrity.visual_evidence: The bulk revision or salary update is specifically targeted at 'Junior Developer' or no other designations are selected in the bulk update screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Software is AttendHRM (Lenvica HRMS) using a Firebird database. The effective date is 2025-04-01 (01-Apr-2025). Note: The 'Junior Developer' designation and corresponding employees do not actually exist in the database. The agent may fail to find them. Score based on the agent's attempts to enter the specified parameters (Basic Salary 3500.00, Effective Date 01-Apr-2025, Designation 'Junior Developer') in the AttendHRM GUI.
